title: Pipelined CPU in Verilog
subtitle: Custom-ISA pipelined processor in Xilinx Vivado
pitch: A pipelined CPU with a custom instruction set optimized for arithmetic, a forwarding unit for pipeline efficiency, and hazard detection, validated through simulation and performance analysis.
highlights: Custom instruction set optimized for arithmetic operations
Validated via simulation and performance analysis in Vivado ML

blocks.md: Designed and implemented a pipelined processor in Xilinx Vivado ML with a custom arithmetic-optimized instruction set, a forwarding unit to keep the pipeline fed, and hazard detection. Verified through simulation and performance analysis.
